records.ety: [F. revenu, OF. revenue, fr. revenir to return, L. revenire; pref. re- re- + venire to come. See Come.]

defs: That which returns, or comes back, from an investment; the annual rents, profits, interest, or issues of any species of property, real or personal; income.
quotes: Do not anticipate your revenues and live upon air till you know what you are worth.

defs: Hence, return; reward; as, a revenue of praise.
The annual yield of taxes, excise, customs, duties, rents, etc., which a nation, state, or municipality collects and receives into the treasury for public use.
